channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Modi's visit highlights tensions within Indian diaspora amid nationalist and supremacist groups
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi's recent visit to Australia sparked significant political discourse, particularly around the Indian diaspora's complex position between Hindu nationalist movements and whi...

item.title: Truck collision in Pune leaves three dead, ten injured
item.description: A severe road accident occurred in Pune district of Maharashtra on Monday when a truck collided with a group of warkari pilgrims. The incident took place on Saswad Jejuri Road, where the truck, carryi...

item.title: NBI Finds No Validated Info on Alleged Sara Duterte Hitman in Impeachment Trial
item.description: During the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) testified that it has not found any validated information to identify the alleged hitman contrac...

item.title: Protecting Independent Journalism in Somalia: Legal, Funding, and Digital Security Strategies
item.description: The article discusses the urgent need to protect independent journalism in Somalia amid government crackdowns and declining press freedom. It highlights the arrest and assault of The Guardian journali...

item.title: Counter-Terrorism Police Investigate Ann Widdecombe's Death After New Evidence
item.description: The death of Ann Widdecombe, a former Conservative minister and Reform UK spokeswoman, has prompted counter-terrorism police to lead the investigation following new evidence. A 28-year-old man from Ro...

item.title: A Ukrainian Photographer's Analog Chronicle of War in Kharkiv
item.description: Vladyslav Krasnoshchok's 'Documentation of the War' offers a profound exploration of the Russian invasion of Ukraine through an analog photographic process. By capturing the daily realities of life in...

item.title: Uber Kenya Support Hubs: How to Locate and Contact for Driver Assistance
item.description: The article provides a comprehensive guide on locating Uber Kenya's driver support hubs, contact details, and eligibility criteria for drivers. It explains how to find the nearest Greenlight Hub throu...

item.title: Actor New Zealand Sam Neill Dies at 78: A Legacy of Iconic Roles and Cultural Impact
item.description: Sir Sam Neill, the beloved New Zealand actor renowned for his iconic role as Dr. Alan Grant in the Jurassic Park franchise, has passed away at the age of 78. His death, described as sudden and unexpec...

item.title: Pixies Praise Dave Grohl's Praise for Their Classic Album 'Surfer Rosa'
item.description: During an interview with NME at the Mad Cool festival 2026, Pixies guitarist Joey Santiago and drummer David Lovering addressed Dave Grohl's recent praise for their 1988 debut album 'Surfer Rosa', whi...

item.title: DCI Shoots Dead Suspect Linked to Robberies in Nairobi
item.description: Detectives from Kenya's Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) shot dead a suspect linked to a daylight robbery at a restaurant in Spring Valley, Nairobi, during a raid in Joska, Machakos County...

item.title: Mpilo Mseleku's Emotional Journey in Reality TV Season Four
item.description: Mpilo Mseleku, part of the reality TV show Izingane zeS’thembu, discusses the fourth season of the series, which airs on Mzansi Magic. The season focuses on his personal growth, emotional vulnerabilit...

item.title: President Mwinyi praises CRDB's role in Tanzania's economic growth during DITF visit
item.description: President Hussein Mwinyi has praised CRDB Bank for its significant contributions to Tanzania's economic development through financing businesses, supporting development projects, and empowering youth ...

item.title: Fashion Mogul Peter Nygard Convicted of Sexual Assault in Montreal
item.description: Peter Nygard, a 84-year-old former fashion mogul and founder of the defunct Nygard International women’s apparel company, has been found guilty of sexual assault and forcible confinement in a Montreal...

item.title: Federal court reverses Supreme Court decision on Margalla Hills restaurant demolition
item.description: The Federal Constitutional Court (FCC) has overturned a Supreme Court (SC) judgment from August 2024 that authorized the demolition of restaurants within Margalla Hills National Park. The SC had previ...

item.title: Nigeria leads in Facebook and AI adoption for shopping, report shows
item.description: A new report by DHL eCommerce reveals that Nigerian online shoppers are adopting Facebook and artificial intelligence at rates surpassing most of the 29 countries surveyed. The report, based on data f...

item.title: Nigeria's Leaders Pay Tribute to Late President Buhari on First Anniversary

item.title: Doctor killed in Karachi robbery near Teen Talwar
item.description: A young doctor working at Jinnah Postgraduate Medical Centre (JPMC) was fatally injured during a robbery incident near Clifton in Karachi. According to police, the tragedy occurred when armed suspects...

item.title: Pokwang's 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal' Stint Highlighted in Photo Collection
item.description: The article showcases a collection of photographs capturing memorable moments from Pokwang's participation in the popular game show 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal.' These images provide a visual recap of ...

item.title: Former US Senator Lindsey Graham passes away at 71
item.description: Lindsey Graham, a prominent US senator known for his close ties to former President Donald Trump, has passed away at the age of 71. The news comes amid ongoing political developments in the United Sta...
